notes: Core mechanics are present but the maze layout is irregular/broken (ghost house area, tunnel rows), ghosts sometimes get stuck or teleport due to tile-snapping issues, and pac-man movement feels jittery with inconsistent collision detection making the game frustrating to play.
Incredible implementation of the original arcade ghost AI, but a strict mode ReferenceError ('frightened is not defined') causes a fatal crash the moment the player loses a life.

Core Pac-Man gameplay is mostly present with workable controls, but there is a real bug from assigning to undeclared variable 'frightened' on death reset and the visuals/maze styling are only a rough approximation rather than faithful Pac-Man.
